about.title: About Me
about.text: I am an engineer specializing in automation, robotics, and model-based systems engineering (MBSE). With hands-on experience at BSH, BMW, and Volkswagen, I combine systems thinking with implementation competence.
projects.title: Projects
projects.bsh.title: Washing Machine Test System at BSH
projects.bsh.desc: Fully automated robotic testing system with over 80% test coverage. Deep-learning-based visual recognition. Custom gripper parts with 3D printing. Master’s thesis: Automated testing systems with collaborative robot.
projects.vw.title: Virtual Factory at VW
projects.vw.desc: Simulation and layout optimization using Tecnomatix Plant Simulation. +20% production capacity, -30% cycle time.
vei.title: VEI Project
vei.desc: Hardware-in-the-loop safety demo using vision and robotic control
